title: Obligación / Tener que
description: Frases para expresar que alguien tiene que hacer algo.

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: You have everything you need.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L11-06 - E1116 - Mia - You have everything you need.mp3

items.speaker: Mother
items.text: We need some vegetables for dinner.
items.translation: Necesitamos algunas verduras para la cena.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L29-01 - E1291 - Mother - We need some vegetables for dinner.mp3

items.speaker: Mother
items.text: We need apples and milk.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L31-01 - E1311 - Mother - We need apples and milk.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: How many apples do we need?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L31-02 - E1312 - Ethan - How many apples do we need.mp3

items.speaker: Mother
items.text: We need six apples.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L31-03 - E1313 - Mother - We need six apples.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: How much milk do we need?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L31-04 - E1314 - Ethan - How much milk do we need.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: You should go to the nurse.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L36-06 - E1366 - Noah - You should go to the nurse.mp3

items.speaker: Mother
items.text: We need to open an account.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L42-02 - E1422 - Mother - We need to open an account.mp3

items.speaker: Clerk
items.text: Yes, but your mother must sign.
items.translation: Sí, pero tu madre debe firmar.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L42-06 - E1426 - Clerk - Yes, but your mother must sign.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: We need to buy Emma a gift.
items.translation: Necesitamos comprarle un regalo a Emma.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L16-01 - E2161 - Mia - We need to buy Emma a gift.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: What should we get her?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L16-02 - E2162 - Noah - What should we get her.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: How many onions do we need?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L20-02 - E2202 - Ethan - How many onions do we need.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: Should I boil the water?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L20-04 - E2204 - Mia - Should I boil the water.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: How much flour do we need?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L21-01 - E2211 - Emma - How much flour do we need.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Do we need any butter?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L21-05 - E2215 - Ethan - Do we need any butter.mp3

items.speaker: Mr. Carter
items.text: You should drink more water.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L22-01 - E2221 - Mr. Carter - You should drink more water.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Should I stop eating snacks?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L22-02 - E2222 - Noah - Should I stop eating snacks.mp3

items.speaker: Mr. Carter
items.text: You shouldn't eat too many sugary snacks.
items.translation: No deberías comer demasiadas botanas azucaradas.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L22-03 - E2223 - Mr. Carter - You shouldn't eat too many sugary snacks.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: We should exercise regularly.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L22-04 - E2224 - Mia - We should exercise regularly.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: And we shouldn't sleep too late.
items.translation: Y no deberíamos dormir demasiado tarde.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L22-05 - E2225 - Emma - And we shouldn't sleep too late.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I should improve my routine.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L22-06 - E2226 - Ethan - I should improve my routine.mp3

items.speaker: Doctor
items.text: You have to rest for two days.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L23-01 - E2231 - Doctor - You have to rest for two days.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Do I have to take medicine?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L23-02 - E2232 - Noah - Do I have to take medicine.mp3

items.speaker: Doctor
items.text: Yes, you have to take it twice a day.
items.translation: Sí, tienes que tomarla dos veces al día.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L23-03 - E2233 - Doctor - Yes, you have to take it twice a day.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Do I have to stay in bed?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L23-04 - E2234 - Noah - Do I have to stay in bed.mp3

items.speaker: Doctor
items.text: No, you don't have to, but avoid exercise.
items.translation: No, no tienes que hacerlo, pero evita el ejercicio.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L23-05 - E2235 - Doctor - No, you don't have to, but avoid exercise.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: We must study chapters three and four.
items.translation: Debemos estudiar los capítulos tres y cuatro.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L24-01 - E2241 - Emma - We must study chapters three and four.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: Do we have to memorize every word?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L24-02 - E2242 - Mia - Do we have to memorize every word.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: No, but we must understand the main ideas.
items.translation: No, pero debemos entender las ideas principales.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L24-03 - E2243 - Emma - No, but we must understand the main ideas.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: We mustn't use our phones during the test.
items.translation: No debemos usar el teléfono durante el examen.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L24-04 - E2244 - Noah - We mustn't use our phones during the test.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: Yes, but we must bring our own.
items.translation: Sí, pero debemos traer la nuestra.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L24-06 - E2246 - Emma - Yes, but we must bring our own.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: We need volunteers to sell tickets.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L28-05 - E2285 - Emma - We need volunteers to sell tickets.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: What should we bring?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L31-06 - E2316 - Ethan - What should we bring.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: We need to pack warm clothes.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L32-01 - E2321 - Mia - We need to pack warm clothes.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Should I bring hiking boots?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L32-03 - E2323 - Ethan - Should I bring hiking boots.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: And we need enough food for two days.
items.translation: Y necesitamos suficiente comida para dos días.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L32-06 - E2326 - Mia - And we need enough food for two days.mp3

items.speaker: Sofia
items.text: We should keep the doors and windows closed.
items.translation: Deberíamos mantener cerradas las puertas y ventanas.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L35-05 - E2355 - Sofia - We should keep the doors and windows closed.mp3

items.speaker: Manager
items.text: You have to arrive ten minutes early.
items.translation: Tienes que llegar diez minutos antes.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L40-01 - E2401 - Manager - You have to arrive ten minutes early.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Do I have to use the cash register?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L40-04 - E2404 - Ethan - Do I have to use the cash register.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: You should make a monthly budget.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L43-06 - E2436 - Emma - You should make a monthly budget.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: You should explain what you've learned this year.
items.translation: Deberías explicar lo que has aprendido este año.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L48-03 - E2483 - Mia - You should explain what you've learned this year.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: Now you have to prepare for the trip.
items.translation: Ahora tienes que prepararte para el viaje.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L49-06 - E2496 - Emma - Now you have to prepare for the trip.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: I mean we should leave later.
items.translation: Quiero decir que deberíamos salir más tarde.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L01-03 - BR1013 - Ava - I mean we should leave later.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: I have to finish some work.
items.translation: Tengo que terminar algo de trabajo.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L03-04 - BR1034 - Leo - I have to finish some work.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: We don't need to show everything.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L19-04 - BR1194 - Nora - We don't need to show everything.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: We only need to catch people's attention.
items.translation: Solo necesitamos captar la atención de la gente.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L19-05 - BR1195 - Ava - We only need to catch people's attention.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: Speaking of the description, we need a title too.
items.translation: Hablando de la descripción, también necesitamos un título.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L21-04 - BR1214 - Leo - Speaking of the description, we need a title too.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: We should confirm it first.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L22-06 - BR1226 - Nora - We should confirm it first.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: Yes, but I have to work late.
items.translation: Sí, pero tengo que trabajar hasta tarde.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L25-03 - BR1253 - Nora - Yes, but I have to work late.mp3

items.speaker: Ben
items.text: Should we restart the computer?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L30-05 - BR1305 - Ben - Should we restart the computer.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: Should we ask people to like the video?
items.translation: ¿Deberíamos pedirle a la gente que dé me gusta al video?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L34-01 - BR1341 - Leo - Should we ask people to like the video.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: Should we tell them to share it?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L34-05 - BR1345 - Leo - Should we tell them to share it.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: We don't have to argue with everyone.
items.translation: No tenemos que discutir con todos.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L35-04 - BR1354 - Nora - We don't have to argue with everyone.mp3

items.speaker: Ben
items.text: Should we ignore rude comments?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L35-05 - BR1355 - Ben - Should we ignore rude comments.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: Thanks. I needed to hear that.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L43-05 - BR1435 - Nora - Thanks. I needed to hear that.mp3
